transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/4nMthQQ4WBEnobvyn2xaB8Ls36YR3roo

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (55 mins - No highlights)

Meeting Purpose

To explore SMB Team as a new marketing partner for a startup law firm.

Key Takeaways

Current Marketing Failure: The firm's marketing is failing due to a lack of strategy, data, and communication from the current vendor. The vendor's plan to pivot to Meta ads is misaligned with client acquisition behavior for workers' comp.

Urgent Need for Predictable Leads: The firm has zero organic leads, with its only three cases coming from referrals. The immediate goal is 5–10 high-quality cases per month.

SMB Team's Proposed Solution: A two-part plan: 1) Use Google LSA/PPC for immediate lead flow, and 2) Implement a coaching program to build scalable systems and processes.

Aggressive Growth Goals: The firm has a 12-month runway after relocating to Portugal. The goal is to replace a combined $400k+ annual income, targeting $250k revenue in year one and scaling to $1M+ annual profit.

Topics

Current Marketing & Firm Status

Firm: New workers' comp firm in Fort Lauderdale, FL, launched in April 2026.

Marketing Vendor: A friend's firm, chosen for trust, has underperformed.

Lack of Strategy & Data: No clear roadmap, objectives, or shared performance data (e.g., cost per acquisition).

Poor Campaign Execution:

Google Ads: Used ineffective keywords ("health insurance questions") and generated no leads from ~200 daily website visitors.

Meta Ads Pivot: The vendor's plan to stop Google ads and focus 100% on Meta is misaligned with how injured workers search for legal help.

Creative Errors: Ads were missing basic contact info (website, phone number).

Lead Generation Bottleneck: Zero organic leads.

Google Business Profile (GBP): Stuck in verification, preventing the firm from appearing in local search or collecting reviews.

YouTube Promos: Generated views but no engagement or conversions.

Firm Goals & Vision

Immediate Goal: 5–10 high-quality cases per month.

12-Month Revenue Goal: $250,000.

Long-Term Vision: Become the "experts in work comp in Florida" with a strong online presence and a reputation for advocacy.

Financial Driver: The firm has a 12-month runway after relocating to Portugal. The goal is to replace a combined $400k+ annual income, targeting $1M+ annual profit.

SMB Team's Proposed Solution

Marketing Strategy:

Focus: Google Local Service Ads (LSA) and Pay-Per-Click (PPC) for immediate lead flow.

Data: Provide a dashboard to track key metrics (cost per lead, cost per signed case) for data-driven scaling.

Systems & Operations:

Coaching Program: Implement a coaching program to build scalable systems for marketing, intake, team, and finance.

Bookkeeping: SMB Team offers bookkeeping services, which the firm plans to outsource once revenue is established.

Next Steps

Randy Gold (SMB Team):

Compile a custom growth plan with a cost-per-lead breakdown to achieve the 5–10 case/month goal.

Send case studies and testimonials from similar startup firms.

Schedule a follow-up meeting for Tuesday, June 16, at 9:30 AM EST to present the plan.

Action Items

Draft customized growth plan (LSA/PPC, CPL, spend, targets) for Michelle; present on Jun 16 9:30 EST - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Michelle credibility pack: case studies, testimonials, reviews, startup refs, high-growth case study - WATCH (5 secs)
Send Michelle calendar invite for follow-up on Jun 16 9:30 EST - WATCH (5 secs)
